economic_notes: Operations include forestry/logging through K'tipx Logging Ltd and Chuchuwayha Forestry Ltd. Equity investments in Stuwix Resources Ltd (12.5%) and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation (33.3%). COVID-19 impacted forestry operations and remote work. CMHC-financed social housing program in operation.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Six entities fully consolidated including logging and forestry corporations. Two GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (Stuwix Resources Ltd. and Vermilion Forks Community Forest Corporation). Restricted cash details noted but balance sheet totals not separately itemized in extracted text. Deferred revenue relates to ISC Water System Capital funding. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt repayments only; capital lease repayments of $160,028 additional. No schedule of remuneration provided. COVID-19 impact disclosed.
